title: Admin Settings
phone_invalid: Phone must be between 8 and 20 characters
name_invalid: Name must be between 2 and 100 characters
name: Name
subtitle: Manage email list for PDFs
confirmSaveMessage: The PDF email list will be updated.
confirmSaveMessageNotification: The notification email list will be updated.
admins_help_add: Use "Add admin" to create new users.
admins_help_fields: RUT and email are required. Name and phone are optional.
admins_help_agent: Agent enables chat for this administrator.
admins_help_actions: Edit with the pencil and confirm with the green check or cancel with the red X.
admins_help_password: The reset icon generates a temporary password.
admin_self_delete_error: You cannot delete your own user
password_strength_error: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number
confirm_block_message: Are you sure you want to block user {rut}?
confirm_unblock_message: Are you sure you want to unblock user {rut}?
change_password_help_step1: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
change_password_help_step2: Must include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.
change_password_help_step3: The 'Block' button allows you to block user access to the system.
change_password_help_step4: A blocked user will not be able to log in until they are unblocked.
avatar_drop_title: Drag an image or click to browse
avatar_error_too_large: The image is too large. Maximum size is 5MB
avatar_error_type: Only JPG or PNG files are allowed
